commands.review_summary:
This PR adds explicit `0o700` directory modes to session, gateway transcript, tool, plugin skill, settings, and atomic text write directory creation paths.

PR surface: Source +4. Total +4 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main still has managed session and transcript directory creation that can inherit umask-derived modes, and the PR body includes before/after mode output for a few paths, but I did not run a live filesystem repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs maintainer/security review because the patch changes compatibility-sensitive storage permissions and has merge-blocking findings rather than a safe automated repair lane.

target.title: fix(security): enforce private directory mode 0o700 for managed state dirs
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

`mkdirSync({recursive: true})` without explicit `mode` inherits umask-derived permissions (775/755 instead of 700). This exposes session transcripts, tool binaries, plugin skills, and settings directories under `~/.openclaw` to group/other users on multi-user systems.

Fixes #92771

## Why This Change Was Made

The project already has ~10 locations that correctly use `mode: 0o700` (auth-storage, secrets/shared, io.audit, state DBs, tmp-openclaw-dir, native-hook-relay). However, 14 `mkdirSync`/`mkdir` calls in the session lifecycle, agent infrastructure, and `writeTextAtomic` default dirMode did not enforce private permissions. This inconsistency left sensitive state directories with world-readable permissions.

## User Impact

- All managed directories under `~/.openclaw` now consistently created with owner-only permissions (0700)
- No config changes required
- No behavioral changes — existing directories with correct permissions are unaffected
- `writeTextAtomic` default `dirMode` now matches `replaceFileAtomic` internal default (0o700)

## Evidence

**Reproduction (umask 0002):**
```
修复前：agents/ → 775 ❌  sessions/ → 775 ❌  plugin-skills/ → 775 ❌
修复后：agents/ → 700 ✅  sessions/ → 700 ✅  plugin-skills/ → 700 ✅
```

**Tests passed:**
- `src/config/sessions/sessions.test.ts` — 45 tests ✅
- `src/config/sessions/paths.test.ts` — 16 tests ✅  
- `src/infra/json-files.test.ts` — 1 test ✅
- Build ✅

| Files changed | +/− |
|---|---|
| 10 files | +19 / −15 |

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
